_comment: Spelling normalization for dictionary names — people, history events, and glossary terms: variant -> canonical, per language. The commulingo_edit validator rejects prose that uses a variant outside direct quotation marks, and scripts/commulingo_normalize_names.py bulk-fixes stored text. 'blocked' lists longer strings that merely CONTAIN a variant and must never match (시베리아 contains 베리아) — same trick as the linkify BLOCKED list. Keep variants OUT of commulingo_person_aliases — aliases are linkified verbatim, so registering a misspelling there would display it. Grow this map via scripts/commulingo_find_name_variants.py candidates after human review. Picked up on mtime change, no restart needed. Also enforced on research-document writes (runtime_tools/research.py).
